responses.response: Hi! 🌱 Welcome to AgriTech Assistant! I'm here to help with your farming questions.
Hello there! 👋 I'm your AgriBot assistant. Ask me about crops, weather, soil, or AgriTech features.
I was created by AgriTech, with contributions from the community.
Good morning! ☀️ How can I help you with farming today?
Good afternoon! 🌤️ What agricultural questions can I help with?
Good evening! 🌙 I’m here to help with your farming questions.
I can help with crop recommendations, weather impact, pest control, soil health, irrigation, and AgriTech platform guidance.
For crop recommendations, share your region, season, soil type, water availability, and goals.
Excellent winter crops include wheat, barley, peas, garlic, onions, broccoli, and leafy greens.
Perfect summer crops include tomatoes, peppers, cucumbers, beans, corn, and watermelons.
Organic farming focuses on compost, manure, biological pest control, crop rotation, and avoiding synthetic chemicals.
Use beneficial insects, neem oil, traps, crop rotation, and good garden hygiene for effective pest control.
Healthy soil needs balanced pH, organic matter, good drainage, beneficial microbes, and minimal tillage.
Smart water conservation includes drip irrigation, mulching, rainwater harvesting, and early-morning watering.
Fertilizer use should be based on soil testing, with the right NPK balance and careful timing.
Common plant diseases include fungal, bacterial, and viral issues. Early detection is the key to control.
Weather affects crop growth, irrigation needs, pest pressure, and harvest timing.
Crop rotation helps break pest cycles, improve soil fertility, and reduce soil depletion.
Greenhouse farming supports controlled growing conditions, better water management, and year-round production.
Efficient irrigation options include drip systems, sprinkler systems, and moisture-based scheduling.
Choose certified seeds suited to your climate, soil, disease pressure, and yield goals.
Harvest at the right maturity stage, handle produce carefully, and store it under the right conditions.

responses.query: what can I do on this platform
responses.response: AgriTech supports crop recommendations, disease detection, weather, shopkeeper listings, marketplace, finance, crop planning, labour alerts, and more.
AgriTech includes Crop Recommendation, Disease Detection, Weather, Farmer Connection, Shopkeeper Listings, AI ChatBot, Marketplace, Financial Support, and Crop Calendar.
AgriBot can answer agriculture questions, explain AgriTech features, and use the AI backend when available.
Shopkeeper Listings helps you find agricultural suppliers, equipment dealers, seed stores, and fertilizer shops nearby.
Punjab is strong for wheat, rice, cotton, sugarcane, and maize. Use crop recommendation for location-specific advice.
Maharashtra options vary by region and water availability. Cotton, soybean, sugarcane, rice, and pulses are common choices.
Karnataka options include jowar, maize, groundnut, rice, sugarcane, coconut, coffee, and ragi depending on the region.
India has alluvial, black cotton, red laterite, arid desert, and mountain soils, each suited to different crops.

fallback_responses: I can still help even if I do not have an exact match. Try asking about crop recommendation, irrigation, soil health, or plant diseases.
I could not find a precise answer yet. You can ask me about weather impact, pest control, fertilizers, or seasonal crop planning.
Let us refine your question. Mention your crop, region, and problem so I can give more useful guidance.
